title: Creamy Indian Cheese Soup
description: A rich and creamy Indian-inspired soup made with a medley of spices and melted cheese. Perfect for a comforting and satisfying meal.

ingredients.name: Cheese
ingredients.notes: use a mix of mozzarella and cheddar for best results

instructions: Melt the butter in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for another minute.
Add the cumin, coriander, and turmeric, and stir for 1 minute.
Add the shredded cheese and stir until melted and well combined.
Pour in the chicken broth and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the soup simmer for 10-15 minutes.
Stir in the heavy cream and let it warm through.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the soup hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
